name: Thanks.dev
description: Thanks.dev — Open-source funding platform that routes donations from organizations to upstream dependencies.

seo.title: Thanks.dev — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Thanks.dev: Thanks.dev — Open-source funding platform that routes donations from organizations to upstream dependencies.

when_to_use: Routing company OSS budget to upstream dependency maintainers
Transparent open-source funding for a developer community
Automated dependency-based donation distribution from an org
Supporting open-source maintainers from a shared team budget
Community-funded OSS project receiving donations via Thanks.dev

pros: Works across npm, PyPI, and more
cons: Small slice of overall OSS funding market
review.verdict: A clever way for orgs to fund OSS without picking favorites, still early and narrow in scope.
review.best_for: Companies wanting to automatically fund open-source dependencies they already rely on.
review.not_for: Individual donors or maintainers needing direct, full-control sponsorship tooling.
